Video.summary: Robert shares the chain of events that inspired him to devote his life to volunteerism and how this can bring deeper meaning to your life and soul too.
Video.title: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Image.alt: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Video.summary: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.
Video.title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Image.alt: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Video.summary: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Video.summary: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.
Video.title: Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone

Image.alt: Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone
Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone
Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone

Video.summary: In this lesson, we'll discover the significance of holy relationships. After all, souls are brought together for the purpose of enlightenment.
Video.title: Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships

Image.alt: Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships
Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships
Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships

Video.summary: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.
Video.title: Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind

Image.alt: Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind
Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind
Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind

Video.summary: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.
Video.title: Day 6: Clarity

Image.alt: Day 6: Clarity
Day 6: Clarity
Day 6: Clarity

Video.summary: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.
Video.title: Day 7: Prana

Image.alt: Day 7: Prana
Day 7: Prana
Day 7: Prana

Video.summary: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.
Video.title: Day 9: Bold

Image.alt: Day 9: Bold
Day 9: Bold
Day 9: Bold

Video.summary: Your day 10 practice starts with a standing warm up and eases into a yoga flow for balance and transformation! Bring calm alertness to the mind and body as you continue to ride the wave of the breath. Build a strong foundation to set yourself up for greatness. Be patient and courageous.
Video.title: Day 10: Balance

Image.alt: Day 10: Balance
Day 10: Balance
Day 10: Balance

Video.summary: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey

Video.summary: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships

Image.alt: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships

Video.summary: Steve discusses mindfulness meditation and how those who practice it reduce their stress, increase their contentment, and achieve more
Video.title: How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor

Image.alt: How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor
How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor
How To Find Inner Peace with Steve Taylor

Video.summary: Why young Americans are having less sex than ever before. Plus, how having a good time in the bedroom can help you in the boardroom.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex

Video.summary: Remember that sexy dream you had? We dish about what it means. Plus, picking the right condom for him and her. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?
Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?
Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?

Video.summary: Stomach aches and pains are a common complaint. Here are the signs that the problem could be serious.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Gastro
Dr. Q&A - Gastro
Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Video.summary: Back pain is one of the most common conditions today but there are treatments, exercises, and therapies that can relieve the pain that don’t involve either narcotics or surgery. But if those interventions are needed you want to make sure you have what you need to make an informed decision
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain
Dr. Q&A - Back Pain
Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Video.summary: Alzheimer’s disease affects millions of people around the world, robbing them of their memory and of so much of their lives. There is still no sure but there are some treatments and active clinical trials that are offering promise. In this program, we discuss some of the lifestyle changes people can make to help prevent or at least slow down the progression of Alzheimer’s and stay as mentally healthy as possible.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Video.summary: Badrinath – Reverberating with thousands of years of yogic wisdom… But Jeff won’t even wear a helmet. You try and talk to him, he won’t listen to me, says Jen. The ebb and flow of relationships and how to sustain them is found here in Badrinath, the temple of Naryana, the sustainer. This isn’t religious, it is all about getting empty and receiving the wisdom of the sages in the great Himalayas.
Video.title: Real Love at Badrinath

Image.alt: Real Love at Badrinath
Real Love at Badrinath
Real Love at Badrinath

Video.summary: Before Riding to the Hidden Valley of the Flowers, we get a rare view of the hidden life of the riders in this real world of yogis opening scene. This lightness contrasts a big incedent at the the following morning, setting the riders and Ryan up for some harsh truths about Power and passivity. True Power is yours to embrace. This is not a journey to feel better.
Video.title: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Image.alt: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Video.summary: A rare in off the cuff dialogue with Anand at breakfast about his father and the true meaning of abundance, wealth, sex, power, fame… Then an epic hike up to 15,000 feet and a temple dedicated to service and unity at Hemkund Sahib and its glacial lake. Here, Tiffany and Elle are served great reminders of the teacher within.
Video.title: Unity at Hemkund Sahib

Image.alt: Unity at Hemkund Sahib
Unity at Hemkund Sahib
Unity at Hemkund Sahib

Video.summary: The longest moto ride of the trip awaits, after a grueling 20 day journey and coming down from Hemkund Sahib, we ride to Rishikesh, where the journey began. But nightfall might set in and cause troubles and challenges. As we know, challenges reveal who we are and the Ganga River serves up a challenge for our narrator Adam, as he learns a deep lesson foretold in episode one. Is the Ganga a mother?
Video.title: A Treacherous Ride Home

Image.alt: A Treacherous Ride Home
A Treacherous Ride Home
A Treacherous Ride Home

Video.summary: We finish at the Sacred Ganga River, where we began. The riders reflect on their journey and the idea of freedom has set in fully. It is our responsibility for choosing how we see the world. To embrace this power, It takes courage, discipline and strength. Something as Sacred as Freedom demands our totality. Thankfully, we are greater than we can imagine.
Video.title: We are Greater than we know.

Image.alt: We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.

Video.summary: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Video.summary: As an ultra-marathoner, men’s coach and father, Jeff Agostinelli has leveraged pain for EXPLORATION. We also cover how to handle substance abuse, why addictive tendencies can be used positively, and how to separate ourselves from emotion.
Video.title: Explore Your Pain Consciously with Jeff Agostinelli & Jeddy Azuma

Image.alt: Explore Your Pain Consciously with Jeff Agostinelli & Jeddy Azuma
Explore Your Pain Consciously with Jeff Agostinelli & Jeddy Azuma
Explore Your Pain Consciously with Jeff Agostinelli & Jeddy Azuma

Video.summary: Men’s sex coach Taylor Johnson knows the top blockages to masculine sexual liberation and offers examples of how to HEAL. We also explore how to achieve sexual mastery and why lasting a long time doesn’t usually lead to good sex.
Video.title: Sexual Insecurities: Expression Leads To Liberation with Taylor Johnson & Jeddy Azuma

Image.alt: Sexual Insecurities: Expression Leads To Liberation with Taylor Johnson & Jeddy Azuma
Sexual Insecurities: Expression Leads To Liberation with Taylor Johnson & Jeddy Azuma
Sexual Insecurities: Expression Leads To Liberation with Taylor Johnson & Jeddy Azuma

Video.summary: Sarrah Rose is a men’s coach specialized in tantric activation, sexual healing, and relational mastery. She leads men to re-discover their primal and sacred generative powers, and shares some of her juiciest findings with us.
Video.title: How Passive Permission Asking Sabotages Epic Sex with Sarrah Rose & Jeddy Azuma

Image.alt: How Passive Permission Asking Sabotages Epic Sex with Sarrah Rose & Jeddy Azuma
How Passive Permission Asking Sabotages Epic Sex with Sarrah Rose & Jeddy Azuma
How Passive Permission Asking Sabotages Epic Sex with Sarrah Rose & Jeddy Azuma

Video.summary: Kari Azuma is a badass leader who guides women in rites of passage journeys and supports new mothers. We address how to navigate periods of low sexual connection, why perpetual overwhelm will create problems, and how to reach shared agreements.
Video.title: Drop The NEED To Control with Kari & Jeddy Azuma

Image.alt: Drop The NEED To Control with Kari & Jeddy Azuma
Drop The NEED To Control with Kari & Jeddy Azuma
Drop The NEED To Control with Kari & Jeddy Azuma

Video.summary: Shems Heartwell is a qi gong practitioner, acupuncturist, land steward, and men’s work leader. We hit on the areas that men struggle with most including the lone wolf mentality, habitual excuse making, and emotional suppression via substance abuse.
Video.title: Own It When You Can’t Hold It with Shems Heartwell & Jeddy Azuma

Image.alt: Own It When You Can’t Hold It with Shems Heartwell & Jeddy Azuma
Own It When You Can’t Hold It with Shems Heartwell & Jeddy Azuma
Own It When You Can’t Hold It with Shems Heartwell & Jeddy Azuma

Video.summary: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?
Video.title: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Image.alt: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet
Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet
Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Video.summary: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?
Video.title: My Mother Terrifies Me

Image.alt: My Mother Terrifies Me
My Mother Terrifies Me
My Mother Terrifies Me

Video.summary: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.
Video.title: I Want to Be Famous

Image.alt: I Want to Be Famous
I Want to Be Famous
I Want to Be Famous

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Image.alt: The Principle
The Principle

Video.summary: The Mark Morris Dance Group works with Parkinson's patients.
Video.title: Capturing Grace

Image.alt: Capturing Grace
Capturing Grace

Video.summary: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.
Video.title: The Highest Pass

Image.alt: The Highest Pass
The Highest Pass
